founders.founding_note: Co-founded Workday 2005 with Aneel Bhusri (after founding PeopleSoft 1987).
notes: Economic stake from proxy footnote 18 (39.98M of 249.7M shares); headline proxy row double-counts Bhusri's B shares via voting agreement.
Giving per TIME100 Philanthropy 2026: $550M cumulative Cornell, $300M+ Maddie's Fund.

founders.founding_note: Co-founded Workday 2005 with David Duffield; Chair, again CEO since 2026-02.
notes: Economic stake from proxy footnote 2 (8.58M of 249.7M); IPO residual includes Greylock fund shares he controlled but did not wholly own.
Giving Pledge 2018; no lifetime total published.

founders.founding_note: Founder and Chairman; predecessor market-making business from 1977, IPO May 2007.
notes: Up-C: 73.7% is deemed beneficial ownership via IBG Holdings LLC; aggregates other members' economic interests - his personal economic % not disclosed. Strict-stake display must flag this.
No published lifetime-giving total; foundation ~$178M endowment.

founders.founding_note: Co-founded Zscaler 2007 with K. Kailash (not a tracked billionaire); serial security founder before.
notes: Single-class stock; 16.8% via family trusts. A further 18.2% sits in separate Chaudhry-family trusts (CJCP/CKS, separate 5% holder) - family aggregate ~35%, his row excludes it.

founders.founding_note: Co-founded DoorDash 2013 with Andy Fang, Stanley Tang, Evan Moore (none tracked).
notes: Economic stake 2.53% (11.1M of 438.2M incl. his 60-day options); 24% voting power partly via irrevocable proxy over Fang/Tang Class B.
Giving Pledge Dec 2021; no lifetime figure.

founders.founding_note: Co-founded Dropbox 2007 with Arash Ferdowsi (not tracked).
notes: 35.22% economic (84.0M of 238.6M); Class A buybacks have steadily concentrated his share.
44.11% = 3.516B of 7.971B WMT shares (Walton Enterprises LLC 3.003B + Walton Family Holdings Trust 0.514B; rows overlap - do not sum naively).
Giving = foundation's first 30 years (1987-2017); cumulative is materially higher (~$0.55B/yr since).

Musk economic stake from 424B4 post-offering table: 6.419B of 13.091B shares (849.5M Class A + 5.569B Class B incl. 1.302B unvested milestone-restricted shares + 350M 60-day options); 84.4% voting power.
Offering: 555.6M Class A at $135 (~$75B raise, record IPO); dual-class A=1/B=10 votes; controlled company.
